notes: Combined hotfix for 1.3.63: (1) /v1/responses returned 500 on every request (ResponsesRequest has no response_format field — Responses API uses text.format). (2) Image endpoints 500'd on wrong-category model names — /v1/images/generations with qwen-image-edit and /v1/images/edits with schnell now return 400 with endpoint-redirect hint. 7 regression guards. 424 pass / 7 skip / 4 pre-existing env fails. PyPI vmlx==1.3.65 live. Recommend immediate upgrade from 1.3.63.
